task: Continued context-orchestrator with a minimal reliability test harness
notes: Confirmed repo-scoped invalidation should only clear docs/context entries, not unrelated skill or memory caches.
codex-orch-unified appears useful as a later source for orchestration patterns, Qdrant workflows, and memory automation.
outcome: Added a lightweight built-in test loop for artifact persistence, cache invalidation, and prepared-context caching.
